rationale: Correct domain framing with a.s. qualifier, integrability noted, and the defining integral equation cited, but analysis is shallow with no uniqueness argument or sub-σ-algebra distinction and no calibrated confidence markers.
rubric_evidence: This holds almost surely (conditional expectations are defined up to null sets)
follows directly from the defining integral equation ∫_A E[Z|F] dP = ∫_A Z dP
